title: Progress Agentic RAG Named 2026 AI Excellence Award Winner for Advancing Retrieval-Augmented Generation
author: Na
description: Progress Software's Agentic RAG platform has won the 2026 AI Excellence Award in the Retrieval-Augmented Generation category. The SaaS platform transforms unstructured data into a governed intelligence foundation for enterprise use, with applications in search, compliance, and customer support. The award recognizes Progress's innovation in making trustworthy RAG accessible to organizations of all sizes.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company received a prestigious 2026 AI Excellence Award for its Agentic RAG platform, demonstrating innovation and market leadership in retrieval-augmented generation. The award recognizes practical, production-ready AI solutions with measurable business impact. Additionally, the platform has received multiple other global accolades, indicating strong market validation and competitive positioning.

title: Stock Market Today: S&P 500, Dow, Nasdaq Futures Gain As Trump Calls Iran's New Leaders 'Very Reasonable'— PLTR, RZLV, ENTX In Focus (UPDATED)
author: Rishabh Mishra
description: U.S. stock futures rose on Monday following Friday's sharp sell-off, with major indices recovering from correction territory. President Trump suggested the U.S. could seize Iran's oil infrastructure while characterizing Iran's new leaders as 'very reasonable.' Markets are pricing in a 96.4% likelihood of unchanged Fed rates in April. Key movers include Palantir Technologies, Rezolve AI, and Entera Bio, while analyst Mohamed El-Erian warns of 'stagflationary winds' and economic headwinds ahead.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock rose 0.66% following announcement of renewal and expansion of five-year partnership with Stellantis, continuing collaboration since 2016. Benzinga Edge indicates strong long and short-medium term trends with solid growth score.
Stock jumped 12.42% after raising revenue outlook to $350 million annual revenue and $500 million ARR by 2026, following $230 million acquisition of Reward Loyalty.

Stock dropped 8.85% after posting a loss of 6 cents per share for Q4. Benzinga Edge indicates weak price trends across all timeframes despite solid growth score.
Stock rose 2.01% following long-term partnership agreement with EDF Group to secure low-carbon electricity supply. Maintains strong trends across all timeframes with solid value score.

title: Stock Market Today: S&P 500, Dow Futures Gain As Trump Calls Iran's New Leaders 'Very Reasonable'—Palantir, Rezolve AI, Entera Bio In Focus
author: Rishabh Mishra
description: U.S. stock futures rose on Monday following Friday's sharp sell-off, with major indices recovering from correction territory. President Trump's comments about Iran's new leaders being 'very reasonable' and potential oil agreements provided some market optimism. Key movers included Palantir (partnership expansion), Rezolve AI (raised revenue outlook), and Entera Bio (earnings miss). Analysts warn of 'stagflationary winds' and expect continued volatility ahead.

title: Why Progress Software Popped Today
author: Joe Tenebruso
description: Progress Software shares jumped 10.62% after reporting strong Q4 results with operating income surging 78% and adjusted EPS of $1.51, beating Wall Street estimates of $1.31. The company issued an upbeat fiscal 2026 guidance with expected revenue of $986 million to $1 billion and cash from operations of $263-277 million, citing strong positioning in the AI-driven market.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong Q4 financial results with 78% operating income surge, adjusted EPS beating estimates by 15%, upbeat full-year guidance, and CEO confidence in AI-driven market positioning drove a 10.62% stock price increase.

title: Progress Software Makes Its Debut in Digital Experience Platform Evaluation by Independent Research Firm
author: Progress Software
description: Progress Software was recognized by Forrester Wave as a top digital experience platform vendor, highlighting its AI-powered capabilities in delivering personalized, dynamic digital experiences across multiple industries.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Earned highest score in search criterion, recognized by Forrester Wave, integrated AI capabilities, praised for ease of use and platform flexibility
